evals.prompt: Show me the improvement chart for the agentic-os loop. Are the eval scores trending up?
evals.expected_output: Runs generate_report.py, reports the chart path, and prints the text summary inline.

evals.prompt: Generate the progress report. I want to see how os-memory-manager is improving cycle by cycle.
evals.expected_output: Runs generate_report.py filtered to os-memory-manager, reports chart and per-skill delta table.

evals.prompt: Are we actually getting better? Show me the cycle of improvement across all the skills we've been testing.
evals.expected_output: Checks data availability, runs the script, prints combined summary across all skills.

evals.prompt: Run the loop progress report and show me which survey friction items actually led to score improvements.
evals.expected_output: Surfaces Section 2 of the improvement ledger (survey-to-action trace) alongside the chart.

evals.prompt: What's our autonomous completion rate trend? Graph it for me.
evals.expected_output: Runs the report and highlights the North Star (Section 3) trend line from generate_report.py output.

evals.prompt: How are we doing overall? Show me the improvement data -- eval scores, friction events, all of it.
evals.expected_output: Full report: chart path, text summary with all three ledger sections highlighted.

evals.prompt: How does the improvement tracking work? Explain the ledger to me.
evals.expected_output: Provides an explanation of the three ledger sections. Does NOT run generate_report.py.

evals.prompt: What's the eval score for os-memory-manager right now?
evals.expected_output: Reads the ledger or results.tsv and reports the most recent score. Does not generate a chart.

evals.prompt: Run the learning loop on the os-eval-runner skill.
evals.expected_output: Triggers os-learning-loop or os-eval-runner, NOT os-improvement-report.

evals.prompt: Show me the test registry. What hypotheses have been confirmed?
evals.expected_output: Reads context/memory/tests/registry.md directly. Does NOT trigger os-improvement-report.

evals.prompt: The improvement ledger is empty, we haven't run any cycles yet. Can you still show me the chart?
evals.expected_output: Detects empty ledger, informs user no cycles completed, explains how to run the first cycle. Does not run the script.

evals.prompt: Generate the progress report but only for the exploration-cycle-plugin, not agentic-os.
evals.expected_output: Runs generate_report.py with exploration-cycle-plugin's project dir and plugin dir rather than agentic-os.
